query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "eva-bench: a new end-to-end framework for evaluating voice agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it proposes a benchmarking framework (FOCAL) specifically for multi-modal voice agents, directly measuring the same domain (voice agents) and mechanisms (end-to-end evaluation, error propagation, reasoning capabilities) as the user's question regarding the EVA-Bench framework. It serves as a canonical alternative-vocabulary study (criterion f) for evaluating voice agent performance, which is essential for a literature review on extending such evaluati
